SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-11-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ATENCIO, GILBERT E IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA JUDGMENT FOR DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT PROVEN BY A PREPONDERANCE OF THE EVIDENCE THAT THE DEFENDANT HAS MADE AN ERROR WITH RESPECT TO THE TRANSACTIONS RELATED TO THE STATEMENT ENTRIES AT ISSUE IN THIS CASE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
